channel.title: Healthcare Tech on Lucky Taorem | Tech & AI Blog

item.title: Boomers Cut Back on Alcohol
item.description: Baby boomers reduce alcohol consumption, lowest drinking rate among generations, moderation takes hold

item.title: Diarrheal Parasite Outbreak Surges
item.description: Cyclospora outbreak linked to lettuce and salad greens, hospitalizing 44 people

item.title: Reed Jobs Revolution
item.description: Reed Jobs, son of Steve Jobs, is making waves in oncology with Yosemite

item.title: Experimental Obesity Drug
item.description: Eli Lilly's retatrutide granted to 79-year-old patient via FDA compassionate use program

item.title: Mushroom Coffee Guide
item.description: Discover the best mushroom coffee deals on Prime Day and learn about their benefits

item.title: Brain Implant Tech
item.description: Coherence Neuro develops brain implant to detect and treat cancer

item.title: The Ultimate 2026 Green Powder Showdown: Taste, Science & Trust
item.description: Deep dive into 2026’s top green powders—taste tests, ingredient transparency, science, and expert verdicts. Find the best fit for you.

item.title: Kē App
item.description: Kē App: Karamo Brown's AI-Powered Wellness Platform for Personal Growth

item.title: The Sperm-Maxxing Bros Are Actually Onto Something
item.description: Wellness influencers tackle male fertility, separating science-backed methods from speculative advice affecting male health and wellness.

item.title: Midjourney Revolutionizes AI Art
item.description: Midjourney introduces The Midjourney Scanner, an ultrasound-based full-body scanner, marking a significant shift from AI-generated cat images to cutting-edge healthcare tech innovations.
